calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-19-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: David Davenport.
Petitioner: Shujan Choi, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for, and with, the Minor: Amelie Nabi Bertrand. Co-petitioner/Minor's father Blane Bertrand, also present in pro per. Petitioners were sworn and examined.
Proof of Publication received and filed in court.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Nabie Amelie Bertrand.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-26-2006 Off Calendar
